author: y4rr
content: Applied: stdlib constants in 3 kernel sites (LOG2_E/LN_2/SQRT_2 in vexp_f32/vlog_f32) + 2 test sites (E in ln/exp round-trip tests). idx() helpers replaced zero-multiplier index formulas in sparse.rs, init.rs dirac test, loss.rs CTC test. #[allow(clippy::approx_constant)] added to 14 test fns where 3.14 is an arbitrary placeholder. cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets is error-free; 3346 tests pass across touched crates.
